@@ -1957,6 +1957,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-rtp","title":"Implement signal-aware context in CLI commands","description":"Replace context.Background() with signal.NotifyContext() to enable graceful cancellation.

## Context
Part of context propagation work (bd-350). Phase 1 infrastructure is complete - sqlite.New() now accepts context parameter.

## Implementation
Set up signal-aware context at the CLI entry points:

```go
ctx, cancel := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
defer cancel()
```

## Key Locations
- cmd/bd/main.go:438 (marked with TODO(bd-350))
- cmd/bd/daemon.go:317 (marked with TODO(bd-350))
- Other command entry points

## Benefits
- Ctrl+C cancels ongoing database operations
- Graceful shutdown on SIGTERM
- Better user experience during long operations

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Ctrl+C during import cancels operation cleanly
- [ ] Ctrl+C during export cancels operation cleanly
- [ ] No database corruption on cancellation
- [ ] Proper cleanup on signal (defers execute)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-11-20T21:26:34.621983-05:00","updated_at":"2025-11-20T21:32:26.288303-05:00","closed_at":"2025-11-20T21:32:26.288303-05:00"}
 {"id":"bd-ruio","title":"Polecat sessions terminate unexpectedly during work","description":"During swarm bd-784c, polecat sessions (Toast, Nux) terminated mid-task without completing their work.

**Observed:**
- Polecats were actively working (edits in progress, tests running)
- Sessions suddenly showed 'not running' in gt polecat status
- tmux sessions existed but were empty/reset
- Work was partially complete (some commits made, issue still open)

**Timeline example:**
1. Toast working on bd-1tkd, making edits
2. Check status 30s later - session empty, state shows 'idle'
3. Had to re-sling to restart

**Impact:**
- Lost work progress
- Required manual intervention to restart
- Unclear if work was saved/committed

**Possible causes:**
- Session timeout?
- Claude Code crash?
- Resource limit?

**Suggestion:**
- Add session health monitoring
- Auto-restart on unexpected termination
- Log session exit reasons","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-28T16:18:09.014372-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/dave","updated_at":"2025-12-28T22:14:20.983555-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-28T22:14:20.983555-08:00"}
